intro: Hieracium pseudauriculiforme, also known as Golden Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery foliage. The health benefits of Golden Hawkweed include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Golden Hawkweed is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
